name: threadatlas-vscode-bridge
description: Expose active VSCode workspace context to the ThreadAtlas browser extension over localhost.

threadatlas.bridge.enabled.description: Automatically start the local ThreadAtlas bridge when VSCode launches.

threadatlas.bridge.port.description: The localhost port exposed to the ThreadAtlas browser extension.

threadatlas.bridge.selectionMaxChars.description: Maximum number of characters captured from the current selection.

threadatlas.bridge.excerptLineRadius.description: How many lines around the current cursor are exposed when there is no explicit selection.

threadatlas.bridge.excerptMaxChars.description: Maximum number of characters captured for cursor-centered excerpts.
